# `!instantiate`

**Category:** inventory

Generate inventory host_vars files and group memberships for a fleet of machines (runs on LOCAL inventory). Triggers the provision system by writing a provision block per host. Supports hostname-pattern expansion and round-robin node distribution.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `inventory_path` | string | yes | Absolute path to the inventory directory. |
| `pattern` | string | yes | Hostname pattern; expands {01..10} (zero-padded range) or {a,b,c} (list). |
| `nodes` | list | yes | Proxmox node names to distribute hosts across (round-robin). |
| `provision` | map | yes | Provision template; required keys type (proxmox_vm/proxmox_lxc) and cluster. |
| `groups` | list | no | Group names to add the generated hosts to. |
| `vmid_start` | int | no | Starting VMID; assigned sequentially per host. Omit for Proxmox auto-assign. |
| `ip_template` | string | no | IP template with {} placeholder (e.g. 10.7.1.{}/24) or literal dhcp. |
| `ip_start` | int | no | Number substituted into ip_template for the first host; increments. Default 1. |
| `gateway` | string | no | Gateway IP; baked into net0 for LXC. |
| `state` | string | no | present (create/update, default) or absent (remove host_vars and prune groups). |
| `save` | string | no | Var name to record the generated hostname list into. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !instantiate
  inventory_path: /opt/jetpack/inventory
  pattern: fleet-{01..05}.lon.riff.cc
  nodes: [bee, moth]
  vmid_start: 200
  ip_template: 10.7.1.{}/24
  ip_start: 230
  gateway: 10.7.1.1
  groups: [testfleet]
  provision:
    type: proxmox_lxc
    cluster: SpaceTempAgency
    memory: 2048
    cores: 4
```
